# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Let a signed-in user upload one or more images to a project from the project settings page.

## Success Criteria

- The project page includes an upload section.
- The user can select one or multiple images.
- Uploaded images appear in the project detail view as current assets.
- The flow is clearly tied to the current project.

## UX Notes

- Keep the upload area simple and calm.
- Avoid overbuilding preview/publish behavior in this slice.
- It is fine to show current uploaded images as a basic list/grid.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Full image processing and language-specific uploads are still future work, so this first slice should stay narrow.
